subcodes.first_line: O staunch believer! Thy recent letter hath arrived. A response to the gathering of Baha'is was written, and their good wishes were warmly received
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومنه موقنه نامه اخیر رسید و بجمع بهائیان جواب مرقوم گردید و تبریک مقبول
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
